content.full_text:
of

California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

September 13, 1988




Honorable Melanie M. Hildebrand
Planning Commissioner
100 Skyline Plaza
Daly City, CA  94015

Re:  Our File No. I-88-353

Dear Commissioner Hildebrand:

     You have requested advice concerning your duties under
Health and Safety Code Section 33130.  The Commission's
jurisdiction is limited to matters governed by the Political
Reform Act (Government Code Sections 81000-91015).
Accordingly, we cannot advise you about Health and Safety Code
section 33130.  We suggest that you consult your city attorney
about your question.

     Enclosed is a pamphlet concerning the conflict-of-interest
provisions of the Political Reform Act.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Diane M. Griffiths
                                        General Counsel

                                        [illegible]

                                        By:  Kathryn E. Donovan
                                             Counsel, Legal Division

DMG:KED:plh

Enclosure




428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

California Fair Political Practices                    August 29, 1988
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, Calif.95804-0807


Gentlemen,


I am a planning commissioner for the City of Daly City. I am
interested in knowing how code section 33130 affects me.

Specifically, if I desire to purchase property located within the
Redevelopment Agency boundries, does this create a conflict of
interest if I disclose to the proper agencies? If this doesn't
create a potential conflict of interest, to whom should I
disclose this information? If my spouse purchases property as
his sole and separate property within Redevelopment Agency
boundries, is this a conflict of interest?

In our city, the planning commission makes recommendations and
does not make final determinations.

I am concerned and would like to make sure that I don't
unwittingly create a problem for myself or the municipality in
which I serve.

Thank you for your attention in this matter.


Sincerely,

Melanie M. Hildebrand
Planning Commissioner in the City of Daly City
